concerns.text: The idea explicitly asks about '(a) the temporal coding characteristics of the network' but the spec does not define any metrics or analysis for temporal coding. US-2 records 'spike activity' but does not specify what temporal coding properties (e.g., spike timing precision, inter-spike intervals, temporal information capacity) will be measured or compared. This drops a core component of the research question.

FR-011 requires sweeping energy-reduction thresholds over {0.20, 0.25, 0.30, 0.35} and reporting false-positive/false-negative rates. The idea mentions a 30% threshold in expected results but does not request a sensitivity analysis across multiple cutoffs. This adds work not explicitly asked for by the research question.

SC-004 references the threshold sweep from FR-011 but does not clarify what 'classification of significant gain' means in temporal coding terms. If temporal coding analysis is added, success criteria should explicitly state what temporal metrics will be measured against what reference.
